subcodes.first_line: O thou handmaiden of God who art drawing nigh! The letter thou hast written should take at least one day to read....The establishment of a women's assemblage for the promotion of knowledge is entirely acceptable, but discussions must be confined to educational matters
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امه الله المقربه نامه ای مرقوم نموده بودید که یکروز اقلا باید صرف قرائت
subcodes.subjects: @role and station of women, @non-participation in politics, @love and unity, @veiling [hijab], @Tahirih [Qurratu'l-'Ayn]
